title: sceptridium biforme
intro: Sceptridium biforme, also known as the Chinese parasol or two-form Sceptridium, is a type of plant species in the family Liliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Sceptridium biforme include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and reduce the severity of various diseases such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and processed into a powder or decoction, which can be taken orally or used topically to treat various health conditions.
